  position: fixed;
  top: 50%; /* Moves to the vertical middle */
  right: 24px;
  z-index: 999999;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 54px;
  padding: 0 22px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-family: Inter, sans-serif;
  color: #fff;

  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0A66C2 0%, #071226 55%, #FF6B00 100%);
  background-size: 250% 250%;
  
  /* Initial hidden state */
  transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(80px);
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: .35s;
  
  box-shadow: 0 12px 35px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px);

  /* Added shrinkButton to collapse padding into a circle */
  animation:
    slideInMiddle .7s ease 2s forwards,
    gradientMove 6s ease infinite,
    shrinkButton 1.5s ease 8.8s forwards; 
}

/* Adjusted hover for the middle screen Y-axis translation */
#tmFounder:hover {
  transform: translateY(calc(-50% - 3px)) scale(1.03);
  box-shadow:
    0 0 18px rgba(10,102,194,.55),
    0 0 40px rgba(255,107,0,.25);
}

#tmFounder::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: -130%;
  width: 60%;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.35), transparent);
  transform: skewX(-25deg);
  animation: shine 5s infinite;
}

#tmFounder svg {
  width: 23px;
  height: 23px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(10,102,194,.45));
}

.typing {
  display: inline-block;
  overflow: hidden;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  
  /* Start completely hidden to hide cursor before typing */
  width: 0;
  margin-left: 0;
  opacity: 0; 
  
  /* Timeline: 
    2.4s to 4.8s (types in)
    4.8s to 8.8s (waits 4 seconds)
    8.8s to 10.3s (types out and hides) 
  */
  animation: 
    typeIn 2.4s steps(22, end) 2.4s forwards,
    typeOut 1.5s steps(22, end) 8.8s forwards;
}

.typing::after {
  content: "|";
  animation: blink .8s infinite;
}

/* --- KEYFRAMES --- */

@keyframes slideInMiddle {
  from {
    transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(80px);
    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
  }
  to {
    transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(0);
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible;
  }
}

@keyframes typeIn {
  0% { width: 0; margin-left: 12px; opacity: 1; }
  100% { width: 170px; margin-left: 12px; opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes typeOut {
  0% { width: 170px; margin-left: 12px; opacity: 1; }
  100% { width: 0; margin-left: 0; opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes shrinkButton {
  from { padding: 0 22px; }
  to { padding: 0 15.5px; } /* Makes it exactly 54x54px */
}

@keyframes blink {
  50% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes shine {
  0% { left: -130%; }
  25% { left: 150%; }
  100% { left: 150%; }
}

@keyframes gradientMove {
  0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
  50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
  100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
}

/* --- RESPONSIVE --- */

@media(max-width: 768px) {
  #tmFounder {
    right: 16px;
    height: 48px;
    padding: 0 16px;
    animation:
      slideInMiddle .7s ease 2s forwards,
      gradientMove 6s ease infinite,
      shrinkButtonMobile 1.5s ease 8.8s forwards;
  }
  
  .typing {
    font-size: 14px;
    animation: 
      typeInMobile 2.4s steps(22, end) 2.4s forwards,
      typeOutMobile 1.5s steps(22, end) 8.8s forwards;
  }
}

@keyframes shrinkButtonMobile {
  from { padding: 0 16px; }
  to { padding: 0 12.5px; } /* Makes it exactly 48x48px */
}

@keyframes typeInMobile {
  0% { width: 0; margin-left: 10px; opacity: 1; }
  100% { width: 160px; margin-left: 10px; opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes typeOutMobile {
  0% { width: 160px; margin-left: 10px; opacity: 1; }
  100% { width: 0; margin-left: 0; opacity: 0; }
}</style><a id="tmFounder" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/digitalhritik/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
